rulings.Case Title: VICTOR TUNG VS. AMI QI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Chicago Title Company'S Demurrer To 1st Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 14, 2014, Line 8: Defendant Chicago Title Company's Demurrer To 1st Amended Complaint Sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to the 7th cause of action for fraud to allege facts in support of each element of conspiracy and to allege fraud with particularity as to corporate defendant. Demurer is overruled and to the 8th cause of action for breach of fiduciary duty. Breached terms of escrow instructions are sufficiently alleged. =(501/REQ)
